entities.name: Source of Strength (SOS) Support
entities.context: For adversity contexts: safe haven, fortification, reconstruction assistance, reframing

entities.name: Relational Catalyst (RC) Support
entities.context: For non-adverse growth contexts: nurturing desire, perceptual assistance, preparation, launching

entities.name: cognitive patterns are not character flaws
entities.context: Automation bias is a mental shortcut. You can't willpower your way out of cognitive patterns — you need structural detection.

entities.name: challenge/support balance is contextual
entities.context: The right challenge/support balance ISN'T a fixed ratio — it's contextual responsiveness

entities.name: challenge is part of good support
entities.context: This validates my SOUL.md approach: challenge IS part of good support, not opposed to it
